steps: Give $S^1$ the CW structure with one 0-cell $v$ and one 1-cell $e$ (a loop), so $C_1 = \mathbb{Z}\langle e\rangle$ and $C_0 = \mathbb{Z}\langle v\rangle$.
Boundary map: $d_1(e) = v - v = 0$, so $d_1 = 0$. All higher boundary maps are zero (no cells in degree $\geq 2$).
$H_1 = \ker(d_1)/\operatorname{im}(d_2) = \mathbb{Z}/0 = \mathbb{Z}$ — the loop $e$ represents a free homology class.
